creator: funman@videolan.org
text:
Hi Anton,

Can you run

gcc -Wshadow -O3 -ffast-math -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -I.
-I. -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -fPIC -I/usr/local/include -std=gnu99
-fPIC -fomit-frame-pointer -fno-tree-vectorize -fprofile-generate -E
input/input.c -o input.i

and attach the input.i ?
